Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-07 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptional long-term performers dominating the momentum rankings. LINC ranks #1 with a score of 93.5, delivering stunning 10-year returns of 2,051% while outperforming SPY by 1,799% over the same period; it passes 4 out of 5 momentum ratio thresholds and trades above all major moving averages (SMA 30/50/100/200). AGX follows as the second top performer with 10-year returns of 1,903% and 5-year returns of 1,276%, though it shows slightly weaker momentum consistency with only 3 ratio passes compared to LINC's 4. Both stocks exhibit "clean" or strong momentum signals with normal volatility profiles and trade well above their long-term moving averages, suggesting sustained uptrends rather than temporary spikes. The primary difference is that AGX demonstrates more volatile ratio progression (particularly the 1.49x ratio from 5y to 10y) compared to LINC's steadier acceleration pattern, indicating LINC's momentum may be more consistent across timeframes.
